_meta.note: BuzzFeed quiz tone · curly apostrophes only · glossary locked

title_001: MBTI Test — Decode Your Personality Code
html_005: Every tap sends an unknown code spinning —
html_007: At the end, one single type unlocks: yours.
html_010: . You can’t see which choice leads where — so only your most honest answers come out.
html_020: 🔒 We don’t reveal the exact score on each axis.
html_021: Don’t get caught up in the numbers — focus on the ‘texture’ of your type.
html_024: This is just for fun. Whatever your code, you’re far more dimensional than any four letters 🤍
html_025: 🧪 Dopamine Lab — more tests this way →
js_009: I recharge in a lively crowd
js_010: I recharge in quiet time alone
js_011: I speak first when I meet someone new
js_012: I hang back and watch until they approach
js_013: I sort out worries by talking them out
js_014: I sort out worries by mulling them alone
js_015: On tired days, friends and chatter recharge me
js_016: On tired days, resting home alone recharges me
js_017: At a gathering I chat with lots of people
js_018: At a gathering I go deep with one or two
js_019: I develop ideas by saying them out loud
js_020: I speak once I’ve thought it through
js_021: Being the center of attention thrills me
js_022: The spotlight feels heavy — I want out
js_023: A call comes in and I happily pick right up
js_024: A call comes in and I hesitate, guessing why
js_025: Traveling, I mingle with people on a whim
js_026: Traveling, I explore quietly at my own pace
js_027: Concrete facts and examples land better with me
js_028: The big picture and hidden meaning land better
js_029: I focus on the reality right in front of me
js_030: I tend to imagine the possibilities ahead
js_031: New info? I ask ‘how do I actually use this?’
js_032: New info? I look for ‘hidden patterns and links’
js_033: I trust what I’ve experienced firsthand
js_034: I trust a flash of gut intuition more
js_035: I retell what happened just as it was
js_036: I tell it with metaphor and imagination
js_037: I learn step by step, one stage at a time
js_038: I want to grasp the core principle first
js_041: I rarely miss the little details
js_042: I see the big picture first
js_043: Picture the future and I see realistic plans
js_044: Picture the future and endless possibilities open
js_045: In decisions, logic and hard facts come first
js_046: In decisions, people’s feelings and bonds come first
js_047: Hear a problem, and I help find a solution
js_048: Hear a problem, and I feel with them first
js_049: Criticized, I weigh whether it’s actually right
js_050: Criticized, I feel the tone and emotion first
js_052: My judgments read the situation and the people
js_054: I lean warm and quick to empathize
js_055: In conflict, I point out facts to set things right
js_056: In conflict, I soothe everyone’s feelings
js_057: When I praise, I name exactly what was done well
js_058: When I praise, I pour in heart to lift them up
js_059: An illogical argument is what I can’t stand
js_060: Cold indifference is what I can’t stand
js_061: After deciding, I ask ‘was that rational?’
js_062: After deciding, I ask ‘did anyone get hurt?’
js_063: For trips I plan a tight schedule in advance
js_064: For trips I just go with the flow
js_065: I’m at ease once my tasks are done early
js_066: I focus best when the deadline’s looming
js_067: I feel settled when my space is tidy
js_068: A little mess doesn’t really bother me
js_069: A sudden change of plans throws me
js_070: A change of plans feels fresh and exciting
js_071: I decide quickly and wrap things up
js_072: I keep my options open and take my time
js_073: I move down my checklist step by step
js_074: I go with what feels right, staying flexible
js_075: I always arrive early to meet-ups
js_076: I’m often cutting it close on time
js_077: A set structure gives me a sense of stability
js_078: Structure is there to bend as the moment calls
js_079: I run my weekends by the plan
js_080: I spend weekends on a whim, by mood
js_082: Already three moves ahead in their head
js_083: You’re a strategist who designs the big picture and quietly makes it real. Complex problems calm you rather than rattle you, and you read the long game others miss.
js_084: Insight and drive. Once the goal is set, you design the path yourself and push it all the way through.
js_085: Lost in the perfect plan, you can overlook how people feel. Sometimes ask about the heart before the logic.
js_087: The one who tags a ‘why?’ onto everything
js_088: You feel most alive when you dig into a principle and truly get it. Your curiosity has no end, and you keep taking even familiar things apart from new angles.
js_089: Original analysis. You excel at untangling complex ideas into clear, clean logic.
js_090: Linger too long in thought and action slips. Sometimes ‘just start’ beats the perfect answer.
js_092: The one who rallies scattered people toward a goal
js_093: You’re a leader who sets a vision and moves people to make it real. You can’t stand inefficiency and are always hunting for a better way.
js_094: Decisiveness and organization. You break even huge goals into pieces and drive the team forward.
js_095: At full speed, others can struggle to keep up. Watch the pace of the people walking beside you.
js_097: The idea machine who throws a stone in still water
js_098: You love new possibilities and a good debate. You challenge the obvious and fire off clever alternatives in an instant.
js_099: Quick wit and creativity. You flip any topic into a fascinating new angle.
js_100: When the interest cools, the finish can fade. Build the muscle to carry what you started all the way home.
js_102: The one who reads what hearts don’t say
js_103: You carry deep insight and warm conviction. Quiet but firm in your values, you sense people’s true feelings with startling accuracy.
js_104: Empathy and insight. You have a rare gift for connecting people to meaning.
js_105: Trying to hold everyone up, you burn yourself out. Leave some time to care for your own heart too.
js_107: The one who holds a whole private universe inside
js_108: You hold authenticity and ideals close. Calm on the surface, you run on fierce conviction and rich feeling underneath.
js_109: Deep empathy and imagination. You believe in people’s potential and back them warmly.
js_110: The gap between ideal and real can wear you down. One small action keeps a big ideal alive.
js_112: The one who lights up the potential in others
js_113: You lift people up and grow right alongside them. With warm charisma you pull a group together and spot everyone’s potential.
js_114: Influence and empathy. You lead people while tending to their hearts — a rare balance.
js_115: Caring for others, you keep putting yourself last. It’s okay to voice your own needs, loud and proud.
js_117: The person whose energy sparkles anywhere
js_118: You brim with curiosity and passion. People and ideas fuel you, and you see the world as a playground full of possibility.
js_119: Passion and connection. You open people up and bring a whole room to life.
js_120: Your interest jumps everywhere and focus scatters. Try digging deep into one thing you love.
js_122: The one who always finishes what they take on
js_123: You’re the very definition of responsibility and diligence. You keep your word and build trust quietly, on facts and principle.
js_124: Reliability and thoroughness. You complete what you’re given without a single gap.
js_125: Stick only to the familiar way and you can miss the shift. Leave the door cracked open for new attempts too.
js_127: The one who looks after everyone without a fuss
js_128: You’re devoted and warm. You notice what people need before they ask, and quietly offer real, practical help.
js_129: Attentiveness and devotion. You put people at ease and guard them steadily.
js_130: Saying no is hard, so the load piles onto you. A ‘no’ can be an act of love too.
js_132: The one who turns chaos into order
js_133: You’re a master of structure and execution. You set the goal, then line up people and tasks with practical, steady moves.
js_134: Organization and responsibility. You turn principle and action into results.
js_135: Put efficiency first and you can skip past people’s circumstances. Watch the heart as closely as the rules.
js_137: The one who builds bridges so everyone fits in
js_138: You’re warm and deeply considerate. You treasure harmony among people and tend to the mood and the relationships with real care.
js_139: Warmth and thoughtfulness. You connect people with ease and look out for them.
js_140: Other people’s approval can sway you. It’s okay to trust your own standard first.
js_142: The quiet fixer who solves problems with their hands
js_143: You’re calm and practical. You take problems apart by doing rather than talking, and in a crisis you get cooler-headed, not warmer.
js_144: Problem-solving and composure. You handle any situation with your own two hands.
js_145: You show little emotion, which can get misread. Now and then, let one true feeling out loud.
js_147: The one who feels the world through their own senses
js_148: You’re gentle and sensory. You feel the beauty of this very moment and express yourself freely and honestly.
js_149: Sensitivity and flexibility. You quietly carry a color all your own.
js_150: Dodging conflict, you swallow what you feel. It’s fine to say what you want — gently.
js_152: The go-getter who dives in right now
js_153: You’re bold and bursting with energy. You judge fast on the spot and feel most alive in the middle of thrill and challenge.
js_154: Quick reflexes and follow-through. You seize the moment without hesitating.
js_155: You move so fast the aftermath can slip by. One beat to look before you leap makes you steadier.
js_157: The one who turns any hangout into a party
js_158: You’re a bright, buzzing mood-maker. You enjoy the now with people and spread laughter and life wherever you go.
js_159: Vitality and warmth. You have a gift for making any moment fun.
js_160: Chasing fun, you can put off what matters. Find the balance between the exciting and the necessary.

_app.title: MBTI Test
_app.desc: An unknown code spins with every tap — one single type unlocks at the end: yours.
